Title: Boolean Search Fundamentals
Objective: Use operators to improve search precision
Hook: Most people search the internet wrong.
CoreContent: Boolean operators AND OR NOT narrow and expand results intentionally.
Mission: Run one query each with AND OR and NOT and compare results.
AlternativePath: Use quoted exact-match search if operators are blocked

Title: Source Credibility Signals
CoreContent: Check author credentials recency citations and publisher reputation.
Takeaway: Use a 4-point credibility checklist before citing.
Mission: Score one source from 1-4 on credibility signals.
AlternativePath: Use domain-level checks when author is unknown
